pages.title: Fallen Star
pages.text: Dropped by $(l:events/star_shower)Star Showers$(). The upgrade path for meteor gear and the raw material for $(l:materials/crystal)Star Blocks$().

pages.title: Star Block
pages.text: A decorative block with a soft glow. Nine fallen stars form one. Also available as $(item)Chiseled$(), $(item)Slab$(), and $(item)Stairs$() variants.

pages.title: Cracked Star Block
pages.text: A damaged variant used in rituals and specific recipes. Crafted by exposing a star block to direct sunlight at a full-moon dawn, or via a crafting shortcut.
